# 09 - MOVEMENT SQUAD (AIOS)

---

## Experts

**Sistema sintético** — sem person DNAs reais. Referências acadêmicas:
- Erica Chenoweth (social movements), Marshall Ganz (organizing)
- Zeynep Tufekci (movements & tech), Richard Millington (community science)
- David Spinks (community-led growth), Donella Meadows (systems thinking)
- Jerome Bruner (narrative psychology)

## Estrutura

- **7 agents** (1 orchestrator + 6 specialists)
- **5 tasks** (build-movement, analyze-phenomenon, create-identity, write-manifesto, measure-impact)
- **2 workflows**

| Agent | Papel |
|-------|-------|
| Movement Chief | Orchestrator — triage, routing, phase diagnosis |
| Movement Architect | Community design, engagement ladders, governance |
| Fenomenologo | Phenomenological analysis, tension mapping |
| Identitario | Identity architecture, tribal markers, boundaries |
| Estrategista de Ciclo | Growth cycles, wave strategy, flywheel |
| Manifestador | Manifesto writing, narrative, memetic propagation |
| Analista de Impacto | Impact measurement, vitality index, ripple mapping |

## DNA por Camada

| Camada | Qtd | Destaques |
|--------|-----|-----------|
| L1: Filosofias | 32 | "Movements born from tension", "Identity precedes growth", "Enemy = system, never people" |
| L2: Modelos Mentais | 41 | 5-Phase Lifecycle, Identity Stack (5L), Impact Pyramid, Community Flywheel, Wave Strategy |
| L3: Heurísticas | 58 | <10min first action, 40%+ active, NPS>50, 3 aha moments, 30-day reinforcement |
| L4: Frameworks | 38 | Movement Canvas, Governance Models (5), Vitality Index, Manifesto Anatomy (7) |
| L5: Metodologias | 34 | Build Movement (5 phases), Analyze Phenomenon, Create Identity, Write Manifesto, Measure Impact |

## Benchmarks Chave

- Intensity: >= 3 for movement-grade (scale 1-5)
- First action: <10 minutes completable
- Active members: 40%+ baseline
- NPS: >50 = healthy
- Values: 3-5 per movement
- Rituals: 5+ minimum
- Vitality: 80+=Thriving, 60+=Healthy, 40+=At Risk
- Emotional content spreads 3x faster

## Processo (NUNCA VIOLAR)

1. Spark → 2. Identity → 3. Ignition → 4. Growth → 5. Impact
- NUNCA pular Spark
- NUNCA escrever manifesto sem identidade definida
- NUNCA 2 expansion waves consecutivas
- NUNCA nomear pessoa como inimigo (sempre sistema)

## Sobreposições

- **Storytelling:** Narrative arc, viral storytelling, rhetoric patterns
- **Brand Strategy:** Identity, positioning, tribal markers
- **Data Growth:** Community metrics, NPS, retention, flywheel

## Cargo Mappings

Contribui para: CMO (brand movement), CEO (vision/movement), Community Manager (novo cargo potencial)
